current_coordinates.active_code_focus: ThinkIt relay, Harvey state mirrors, Doozer/reviewer momentum loop, and round-trip proof clarity.
current_coordinates.active_project_question: Oddly Godly on Spanzee: what can run on AUTO G, and what still needs a leash?

workflow.optional_lane_note: Kind Sir, Nerdkle, and Oddly Godly are optional side lanes. They are visible only when the operator asks for side-lane context; they are not the default G target.
workflow.builder_team_note: The Fraggle Rock builders are the Doozers. Here, Doozers means the cowork/build lane: Maker, Dink, and Ender when Ender is cutting, filtering, or shaping work.
workflow.review_team_note: Reviewers do not build first. They sign off, catch drift, name missing proof, kill weak ideas, or ask for a sharper packet.
workflow.thinkit_job: ThinkIt routes the packet, records the decision, shows who answered, and refuses to call SENT success.
perfect_loop: Doozers propose the next concrete build move.
Reviewers sign off, modify, or kill the proposal.
ThinkIt dispatches the chosen work and waits for receiver proof.
Speaker/Brainboot records what changed so the next session starts from shared reality.
